title: secretx-file: implement filesystem backend
description: Implement SecretStore for filesystem paths. URI: secretx://file/<path>. Absolute paths use double slash: secretx://file//etc/secrets/key. Relative paths: secretx://file/relative/path (relative to CWD). get() reads entire file contents. put() overwrites file with mode 0600 (fail if parent dir does not exist). refresh() re-reads from disk. No caching (re-read on every get unless wrapped in CachingStore). No external deps beyond secretx-core. Useful for Docker secrets (/run/secrets/), Kubernetes secret volume mounts, and dev. Default-enabled backend.
